text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm... What to choose... What to<n>choose...
choice_data_list: Can't decide what to have for lunch?
Can't decide what to have for lunch?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't decide between Falco or<n>Vodka.
choice_data_list: By which you mean... what exactly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why are you looking at me like that?<n>They ordered
different things off the<n>menu, so I can't decide
which of the<n>two I should get.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Being able to eat the same exact<n>meals as my
oshis every day is a<n>luxury only afforded when
attending<n>this sacred institution, Tracen<n>Academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Yesterday, I had Ryan's<n>lunch, and
Tamamo's the day before<n>that! Oh, but don't
worry! I'm making<n>sure to keep my diet balanced!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If it's a day I choose Spe or Oguri,<n>I'm always
careful to get a more<n>manageable portion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eating the same lunch as my oshis is<n>an official
method to infinitely expand<n>one's imagination.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I want to intervene, but that'll just<n>drag the
conversation on longer, so I<n>keep quiet and hand
her a lunch tray.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oohoohoo... You wanna geek out<n>together over
lunch? ♪ I know, why<n>don't you choose for me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whose lunch do you think looks<n>better? Falco's
or Vodka's?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Falco's lunch! She likes her<n>plates to look
photogenic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, Falco always eats her salad<n>first, so I'll
be following sui—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Digital! Is it okay if I sit next to<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwah! Falco?! Um? Uhhh, we can<n>just move,
actually!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nooo, that's not what I want! I'masking if we can eat together.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer, right? You don't<n>mind if I join,
do you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehehe, thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, just as I thought! You got the<n>same thing I did!
I caught a glimpse of<n>your tray, and it made me
curious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Agyaaaa! I'm sooo sorry for copying<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is that your way of showing respect?<n>I'm really
flattered! ☆ Ooh, I wanna<n>take a selfie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A fan told me earlier that she wants<n>to attend
Tracen Academy, so I<n>thought it'd be nice if I
posted some<n>pics to show her what campus life is
like.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're doing this for your fan?<n>O-ohhh! You're
such a model Umadol!<n>Sublime... to the max!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, can I post a pic of you and your<n>lunch on
Umatter too?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pwah?! A picture with m-m-m-me?! I<n>mean, if it's
for one of your fans,<n>then I guess it'll be in
service to a<n>comrade, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, then let's take one together!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, this one looks good!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she'll see my post. You<n>know, she told
me she's good at<n>running on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to respond to<n>her letter by
showing off some<n>training methods. So, how do
you<n>usually train, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I don't know if this will be of any useor not, but... I try to run on the dirtpractice course when it's firm andwhen it's heavy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So you do special training on tracks<n>with bad
footing! It's hard to keep<n>good form in those
conditions, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, I get a lot of people to<n>run with me... It
helps me practice<n>dealing with dirt and sand flying
at me<n>from up ahead.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I see what you mean! I'm a<n>front runner so
I don't usually have<n>to deal with that.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You've really got your dirt training in<n>order!
Hmmm, I'd better watch my<n>back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nononono! You're still in a whole<n>different league
than me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you can trick me into<n>letting my guard
down! ☆ I've marked<n>you as my rival now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ggk... Ghk... Nghhh! I-I'm... not...<n>wooorthy!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital and Smart<n>Falcon spend a
fruitful lunchtime<n>talking about how they practice
for<n>dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's dig in with Vodka's<n>lunch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's the big idea, sitting next<n>to me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm sitting next to you<n>because I want
to. This is the only<n>seat that's free. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You totally got it! You really are a simp<n>after my
own heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I get so immersed imagining Vodka's
conversations while enjoying the<n>same food she
eats!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwhoa! Vodka just stole one of<n>Scarlet's shrimp...
"Excuse you! You<n>think it's okay to just snatch
other<n>people's food?!"

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital spends the<n>entire lunch
period imagining a<n>dialogue between Vodka and
Daiwa<n>Scarlet... like a true superfan.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! I'm stuffed! That's what I call<n>a fulfilling
lunch!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital, do you have a second?<n>There's
something I'd like to check<n>with you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Were you mimicking us back in the<n>cafeteria?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! I'm s-s-s-soo sorry! I'll make<n>it up to you!
I'll... I'll harakiri!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Harakiri?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Cause you're scarin' the crap outta<n>her. Look at
how she's shakin'...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... A real-life quarrelbetween Scarlet and Vodka, right infront of me... Guehehe.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This ain't a fight! I'm just callin' her<n>out for
puttin' you on the spot, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...It's not like I'm angry or anything. I<n>just thought
it was incredible you<n>could hear us from that
distance. Your<n>hearing must be amazing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was just imagining what I<n>thought you might
be saying... I<n>couldn't hear your conversation at
all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You were just imagining it?! But you<n>were dead
on for the whole<n>conversation! Are you sure you
weren't lipreading or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it was really just my<n>imagination. Um, by the
way... how<n>come you guys noticed what I was
doing?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like anyone couldn't notice, you<n>were practically
shoutin' at your<n>trainer.
choice_data_list: I guess you were so into it you didn't realize.
I guess you were so into it you didn't realize.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I don't deserve to live!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You gotta say sorry each time? It<n>isn't that deep!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you really recreated our<n>whole
conversation just by imagining<n>it? That's pretty
damn amazin'.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I think it just goes to show how<n>thoroughly
she's researched us.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In that case, lemme do some<n>research of my own!
Come run with<n>me, Digital! Best way to grasp your
opponent is to duke it out with 'em!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's no fair! You can't hog<n>her! I want to
run with Digital too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What? Quit tryna butt in!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A match against me would help<n>Digital get serious.
...Oh, but I see.<n>You're scared I'm going to beat
you,<n>aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
As if! That's totally my line! Fine, all<n>three of us
can run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-all three of us? I've got VIP seats<n>to a battle
between Scarlet and<n>Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WOOHOOOOOAGHKJ!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is walking on<n>sunshine... and the
group running<n>session after school turns out to be
a<n>very fruitful practice.
